description: You are a manufacturing engineer configuring a Webots digital twin of a CNC flatbed marker. The physical machine has strict operational bounds of 400mm x 300mm, and its red marking pen needs to be properly calibrated in simulation. Configure the 'CNC_PLOTTER' robot by setting the 'X_LIMITS' SliderJoint parameters to a minStop of 0.0 and maxStop of 0.4, and the 'Y_LIMITS' SliderJoint parameters to a minStop of 0.0 and maxStop of 0.3. Additionally, configure the 'MARKING_PEN' node to enable drawing (write: TRUE) with an inkColor of 1 0 0 (pure red) and a leadSize of 0.002. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/cnc_digital_twin.wbt.
